auth.login.title: Sign in to your account
auth.register.title: Create your account
auth.recovery.title: Recover your account
auth.recovery.description: Enter your email address and we'll send a password reset link if an account exists.
auth.recovery.success.title: Check your email
auth.recovery.success.description: If an account matches that email address, we sent a password reset link.
auth.reset-password.title: Create a new password
auth.reset-password.description: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.reset-password.error: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.
auth.reset-password.invalid.title: Reset link unavailable
auth.reset-password.invalid.description: This password reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new link to continue.
auth.confirm-email.title: Confirm your email
auth.confirm-email.idle.description: Use this confirmation link to verify your email address.
auth.confirm-email.pending.title: Confirming your email
auth.confirm-email.pending.description: We're verifying your confirmation link now.
auth.confirm-email.success.title: Email confirmed
auth.confirm-email.success.description: Your email address is confirmed. You can continue to Hive.
auth.confirm-email.error.title: Confirmation link unavailable
auth.confirm-email.error.description: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Request a new email to continue.
auth.confirm-email.resend.title: Resend confirmation email
auth.confirm-email.resend.description: Enter your email address and we'll send another confirmation link if an account exists.
auth.confirm-email.resend.success: If an account matches that email address, we sent a new confirmation email.

validation.expires-at.future: Expiration date must be in the future
